recommendations.title: Lu Over the Wall
recommendations.overview: In a small fishing village, a gloomy middle school student named Kai meets a mermaid named Lu.

recommendations.title: Mind Game
recommendations.overview: Nishi is a loser who has a crush on his childhood girlfriend. After an encounter with the Japanese mafia, he journeys to heaven and back, and ends up trapped in an even more unlikely place.

recommendations.title: Ride Your Wave
recommendations.overview: Hinako is a surf-loving college student who has just moved to a small seaside town. When a sudden fire breaks out at her apartment building, she is rescued by Minato, a handsome firefighter, and the two soon fall in love.

recommendations.title: Night Is Short, Walk On Girl
recommendations.overview: As a group of university students go out for a night on the town, a sophomore known only as "The Girl with Black Hair" experiences a series of surreal encounters with the local nightlife – all the while unaware of the romantic longings of "Senpai", a

recommendations.title: KPop Demon Hunters
recommendations.overview: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

recommendations.title: The Iron Claw
recommendations.overview: The true story of the inseparable Von Erich brothers, who made history in the intensely competitive world of professional wrestling in the early 1980s. Through tragedy and triumph, under the shadow of their domineering father and coach, the brothers

recommendations.title: The Duchess
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the life of 18th century aristocrat Georgiana, Duchess of Devonshire, who was reviled for her extravagant political and personal life.

recommendations.title: Bob Marley: One Love
recommendations.overview: Jamaican singer-songwriter Bob Marley overcomes adversity to become the most famous reggae musician in the world.

recommendations.title: The Maker
recommendations.overview: A strange creature races against time to make the most important and beautiful creation of his life.

recommendations.title: Silence
recommendations.overview: In the 17th century, two Portuguese Jesuit priests travel to Japan in an attempt to locate their mentor, who is rumored to have committed apostasy, and to propagate Catholicism.
